artifacts.title: See receipt from 2025-06-19

THE POSTSCOPE IS HERE!!!
With only one click, analyze the discourse of the replies to the post you are seeing.
Explore the connections, find clusters, and see how your replies fit!
Try it at https://t.co/8oLnuHfgdF

Idea and base code by @DefenderOfBasic https://t.co/bvvjav76tK

artifacts.title: See receipt from 2025-07-24
artifacts.excerpt: @attentionmech it most likely is not at a saddle point. it looks like it to the agent because it is looking at a low dimensional representation of the whole space. if it looked at a higher dimensional representation, it would see that there are ways out.
